summary: Phase 2 Refactoring: usePhilosState.js split into 5 domain-specific hooks - All 21 frontend tests PASSED. The refactoring successfully reduced usePhilosState.js from 1198 lines to 275 lines while maintaining full backward API compatibility. All features work exactly as before: decision evaluation, history updates, recommendation system, tab navigation, cloud sync indicator, and Hebrew RTL layout.
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: usePhilosState.js reduced from 1198 lines to 275 lines - excellent maintainability improvement
GOOD: Clean domain separation - each hook handles a specific concern
GOOD: useDecisionState handles core decision evaluation and state persistence
GOOD: useCloudSync manages cloud sync, hydration, and multi-device continuity
GOOD: useReplayState handles decision replay functionality
GOOD: useAdaptiveScores manages adaptive scores and path learning
GOOD: useSessionManagement handles global stats, trend history, and session snapshots
GOOD: Backward API compatibility maintained - main hook composes all domain hooks
GOOD: Helper functions (calculateAdaptiveScores, applyReplayInsightsToScores, getValueTag) properly re-exported
GOOD: ESLint passes with no issues on all hook files
NOTE: Some eslint-disable comments for react-hooks/exhaustive-deps - acceptable for controlled dependency management
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 refactoring complete. usePhilosState.js now composes 5 domain-specific hooks: useDecisionState (core decision evaluation), useCloudSync (cloud sync and multi-device), useReplayState (decision replay), useAdaptiveScores (adaptive scores and path learning), useSessionManagement (global stats, trends, snapshots). All state and functions organized by domain. Key data-testids unchanged: home-navigation-section, home-action-input, home-follow-recommendation-btn, home-evaluate-btn, tab-home, tab-insights, tab-system, tab-history, decision-result, recent-history.

decision_evaluation_tests.test: Evaluate button appears with action input

cloud_sync_and_custom_action_tests.test: Custom action input enables evaluate button

new_hooks.purpose: Core decision evaluation and state persistence
Global stats, trend history, session snapshots

verified_refactoring.backward_compatibility: 100% - All original exports maintained from main hook
